apis.name: GetMapTileCommand
apis.description: Retrieve a map image for a specified location and zoom level.

requestParams.name: X
requestParams.description: The X axis value for the map tile.

requestParams.name: Y
requestParams.description: The Y axis value for the map tile.

requestParams.name: Z
requestParams.description: The zoom value for the map tile.

apis.name: SearchPlaceIndexForTextCommand
apis.description: Geocodes free-form text, such as an address, name, city, or region to allow you to search for Places or points of interest.

requestParams.name: IndexName
requestParams.description: The name of the place index resource you want to use for the search.

requestParams.name: Text
requestParams.description: The address, name, city, or region to be used in the search in free-form text format.

requestParams.name: BiasPosition
requestParams.description: An optional parameter that indicates a preference for places that are closer to a specified position.

requestParams.name: FilterBBox
requestParams.description: An optional parameter that limits the search results by returning only places that are within the provided bounding box.

requestParams.name: FilterCategories
requestParams.description: A list of one or more Amazon Location categories to filter the returned places. If you include more than one category, the results will include results that match any of the categories listed.

requestParams.name: FilterCountries
requestParams.description: An optional parameter that limits the search results by returning only places that are in a specified list of countries.

requestParams.name: Key
requestParams.description: The optional API key to authorize the request.

requestParams.name: Language
requestParams.description: The preferred language used to return results.

requestParams.name: MaxResults
requestParams.description: An optional parameter. The maximum number of results returned per request. The default: 50

requestParams.name: CalculatorName
requestParams.description: The name of the route calculator resource that you want to use to calculate the route.

requestParams.name: DeparturePosition
requestParams.description: The start position for the route.

requestParams.name: DestinationPosition
requestParams.description: The finish position for the route.

requestParams.name: ArrivalTime
requestParams.description: Specifies the desired time of arrival. Uses the given time to calculate the route. Otherwise, the best time of day to travel with the best traffic conditions is used to calculate the route. ArrivalTime is not supported Esri.

requestParams.name: DepartNow
requestParams.description: Avoids tolls when calculating routes. Default Value: false

requestParams.name: DepartureTime
requestParams.description: Specifies the desired time of departure. Uses the given time to calculate the route. Otherwise, the best time of day to travel with the best traffic conditions is used to calculate the route.

requestParams.name: DistanceUnit
requestParams.description: Set the unit system to specify the distance. Default Value: Kilometers

requestParams.name: IncludeLegGeometry
requestParams.description: Set to include the geometry details in the result for each path between a pair of positions.

requestParams.name: OptimizeFor
requestParams.description: Set to include the geometry details in the result for each path between a pair of positions.

requestParams.name: TravelMode
requestParams.description: Specifies the mode of transport when calculating a route. Used in estimating the speed of travel and road compatibility.

requestParams.name: AvoidFerries
requestParams.description: Avoids ferries when calculating routes.

requestParams.name: AvoidTolls
requestParams.description: Avoids tolls when calculating routes.

requestParams.name: Dimensions
requestParams.description: Avoids tolls when calculating routes.
